'''Ka'i'lorshin''' was a [[Kajain'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kajain'sa'Nikto]] who served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent and a member of the [[Sandwind Team (Sriluur)|Sandwind Team]] on [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]]. Ka'i'lorshin served as the team's sharpshooter.

{{Char-stub}}
